style_a.name: 灰暗现实主义
style_a.prompt_suffix: handheld camera, film grain, desaturated cold tones, blue-grey color palette, urban isolation, dimly lit

style_b.name: 东方赛博神话
style_b.prompt_suffix: epic cyber mythology, golden and neon blue palette, weightless atmosphere, digital particles, majestic scale

music_sync.lyrics: [前奏响起] → '生活中，我是一个平凡的人。但在这里，我将成为一段传奇！'

atmosphere.overall_mood: 深夜出租屋的压抑孤独感，屏幕冷光映照疲惫面容，随着独白推进眼神逐渐坚定，暖光开始侵蚀冷灰
atmosphere.lighting: 屏幕蓝白冷光为唯一光源，戴上眼镜后金色暖光从屏幕渗出

video_prompt: A lonely programmer in a cramped dark apartment at night, lit only by blue screen light, surrounded by crumpled papers, slowly turns with determined eyes and puts on glasses as golden light begins to glow from the screen, handheld camera, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio, 15 seconds.

bgm.description: 低沉压抑的前奏，缓慢的节奏，带有电子合成音色的底层铺垫

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 深夜出租屋全景，主角背影面对亮着代码的显示器，桌上散乱的草稿纸和咖啡杯

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 背对镜头坐在桌前，肩膀微微下沉

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 孤独压抑，仅屏幕蓝光照亮背影
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 键盘敲击声、电脑风扇低鸣
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Back view of a young man sitting alone at a messy desk in a dark cramped apartment, blue monitor light illuminating his silhouette, crumpled papers and coffee cup on desk, cold blue-grey tones, handheld camera feel, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 缓慢推镜头靠近主角，能看到他疲惫低垂的侧脸轮廓

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 低头看着屏幕，手指无意识地敲击桌面

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 推镜头逐渐走近孤独的背影
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Dolly in closer to a tired young programmer, showing his weary profile illuminated by blue screen light, messy black hair, slightly hunched shoulders, dark cramped room, cold blue tones, film grain, intimate and melancholic, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角缓缓抬起头，眼神从迷茫中浮现出一丝光亮

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 缓缓抬头，目光从屏幕移向前方

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 独白开始，内心独白的静谧感
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a young Asian man slowly raising his head from a computer screen, tired eyes with a faint spark of thought, blue screen light on face, dark background, film grain, contemplative mood, cold blue tones warming slightly, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 桌面特写——散乱的草稿纸、代码打印稿、半空的咖啡杯，主角手伸向桌角的黑框眼镜
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 聚焦于桌面细节，暗示即将发生的改变
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 手指滑过桌面的轻微声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Top-down close-up of a messy desk with crumpled papers, code printouts, half-empty coffee cup, a hand reaching for black-framed glasses at the corner of the desk, dim blue lighting, film grain, anticipation building, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角拿起眼镜，缓缓戴上，镜片反射出显示器的蓝光

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 双手捧起眼镜缓缓戴上

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 关键动作——戴上眼镜=开启穿越的钥匙
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 眼镜展开的细微金属声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a young man with determined expression putting on black-framed glasses, monitor's blue light reflecting on the lens surface, dark room background, the moment of decision, cold blue tones, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 眼镜镜片特写——镜片上开始浮现跳动的金色代码字符

characters.name: 程序员
characters.expression: 坚定，瞳孔中映出金色代码

transition.description: 金色代码开始侵蚀冷灰色调

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 转折点——金色元素首次出现，暗示奇迹世界
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Extreme close-up of glasses lens reflecting golden code characters beginning to flow and dance across the glass surface, the eye behind showing determination, blue background starting to warm with golden accents, transitional moment, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 屏幕突然闪烁出异样的金色光芒，整个房间瞬间被金色光洗

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 面朝屏幕，被金色光芒照亮

transition.description: 金色光芒从屏幕扩散填满房间

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 金色光芒爆发，冷灰房间被瞬间照亮
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A dark room suddenly flooded with golden light emanating from a computer screen, a young man in glasses silhouetted against the brilliant golden glow, cold grey room being washed over by warm golden light, dramatic lighting contrast, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角侧脸特写，一半被冷蓝光照亮，一半被金色光照亮，形成明显的明暗分界线

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 侧脸面向镜头，纹丝不动

transition.description: 半蓝半金的面部光影——两个世界的分界线

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 两个世界在主角面上交汇——左冷蓝，右暖金
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Dramatic close-up of a young man's face split by two-tone lighting, left side in cold blue monitor light, right side in warm golden glow, wearing black-framed glasses, determined expression, the dividing line between two worlds on his face, cinematic split lighting, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 金色光芒完全吞没整个画面，淡出为纯金光，为下一段的城市场景做过渡

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 身影逐渐消融在金色光芒中

transition.description: 金色光芒溶解过渡到下一段

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 金色光芒完全笼罩，世界即将改变
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 嗡鸣声达到顶点后骤停
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A figure being completely engulfed by brilliant golden light in a small room, the entire frame washing out to golden white, dissolving transition, warm golden overwhelming the cold blue, magical transformation moment, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio
